phases.name: P0 — Skill-Gate Starve
phases.v2Mode: Mode A — agent-only (scout, pain-mine, draft, domain warmup); ≤20 min/day human approvals

phases.name: P1 — Ignite V1 Cash
phases.v1Share: ~80% (≈5.5–6.5 hrs: renders + DMs + first calls + first delivery)
phases.v2Mode: Mode A continues — agents keep staging; warmup matures; NO human outreach yet

phases.name: P2 — Stagger V2 In
phases.trigger: V1 first cash banked ($3–5K) OR Day-45 backstop (Wed Jul 29) with ≥3 free hrs/day
phases.v2Mode: Mode B opens — V2 S0→S1: partner hunt, interviews, concierge onboarding of 1 live partner

phases.name: P3 — Two Engines Live
phases.v2Mode: Mode B steady — V2 S1/S2 concierge + first leading-indicator win; S3a scaffold async via dev agent

dailyTemplates.name: Variant A — Skill-Phase Day
dailyTemplates.total: ≈5.0–5.5 hrs (deliberately under ceiling — the gate needs a fresh brain, not a maxed one; the slack is recovery that protects render quality)

blocks.what: Overnight agent review (both dashboards); clear V2 AM SLA if live; name today's drill
The next drill in the D1→D8 ladder (no skipping). Log every render's 8-pt rubric verdict before watching the next.
Review/confirm ONE Week-1 critical-path infra item; agent drafted the DNS/config, you click-confirm

blocks.block: PM — DM network warm + skill admin
blocks.what: Comment+follow 5 named A-tier founders; compute hit-rate; name tomorrow's deliberate-practice target
Approve the day's Mode-A agent output (scout rows, pain quotes, a drafted asset). One approval, hands off.
Stamp practice log + V1 tracker; queue tomorrow's drill

dailyTemplates.name: Variant B — Outreach-Phase Day
dailyTemplates.whenPhase: P1/P2 — selling V1, staggering V2 in
dailyTemplates.total: Without V2 ≈ 6–7 hrs (V1-only, P1); with V2 ≈ 7.5–8.5 hrs (P2/P3). If the V2 GATE hasn't fired, V2 collapses to the ≤20-min approval block from Variant A.

blocks.what: Overnight review; clear V2 AM SLA window; name today's #1 V1 action
Batch 4–6 made-for-them prospect samples (15s, templatized). Protect A-tier: re-render until it clears the bar.
DM/send the day's priority leads (sample-backed); check + route reply inbox AM (rule in §2B of doc 37). Inbox to zero unactioned.
Run the 15-min discovery script: spend-branch → Track → pain-dig → pitch → live quote → close. Log verdict.

blocks.block: V2 — concentrated human block (gate-fired days only)
blocks.what: The week's V2 [HUMAN] work that lands today: a partner interview (batched PM), an onboard, script craft, or the paid ask. Capped 180 min.
Doc-20 engine: pull idea → long → X → LI → queue → reply to 5–10 ICP posts. 3×/wk until first cash, daily after.
Active pilot/retainer cycle: angle lock → 24 variations → QC every clip → launch → Day-14 read. Baseline FIRST on any new pilot.
Clear V2 PM SLA window; stamp both trackers; queue tomorrow

dailyTemplates.name: Variant C — Delivery-Phase Day
dailyTemplates.whenPhase: P3 — both engines have live obligations
dailyTemplates.total: ≈7.5–9 hrs (the ceiling-pressing day). If combined load >~6 hrs/day for 3+ consecutive days, FREEZE new V1 selling and onboard no new V2 live partner until it clears.

blocks.block: AM ritual + V2 AM SLA window
blocks.what: Overnight review; approve AI-drafted novel presale replies in the fixed AM window (agent auto-handled holding templates overnight)
Cycle work across live brands; QC every clip; capacity-alarm if >2 brands (see §6 kill-line)
Discovery / pilot→retainer conversion calls — the highest-ROI V1 phase
Maintain sends + route replies; lead list never starves (+10/wk floor)

blocks.block: V2 — weekly human block (only on its day)
blocks.what: The S3 weekly 90-min app-review block OR script-versioning OR the paid ask — only on the one weekday it's scheduled
Whatever survives after the above; first to be cut entirely on a hot day

blocks.block: PM — V2 PM SLA window + close
blocks.what: Approve novel presale replies in the fixed PM window; stamp both trackers; queue tomorrow

weekly.v2: Partner sync calls (15 min ×1–2) + AM-window queue review
Live-ticket approval in 2 SLA windows; refine weak scripts
Author/version 3–5 new day-stage scripts from real tickets
weekly.shared: Capture session (20 min, refill Idea Bank ≥10) + creative teardown

weekly.v2: ZERO-[HUMAN]-V2 DAY — agent builds the before/after win table async; Chaga only sanity-checks baseline method if flagged

weekly.v1: Samples + sends; +10 new leads (surge +40 if unworked <30); Day-14 reads
weekly.v2: Log refund/dispute "saves"; ask 1 happy partner for experience-only testimonial
weekly.shared: V1 lead-gen block (2 hr) + Newsletter QUEUED + KPI packet [A]-prepped (Review-Prepper)
HARD REST — no client work, no calls, no sends, no tickets, either venture

weekly.v2: Weekly gate review against the active V2 stage's exit criteria
weekly.shared: Newsletter SEND (auto/queued) + combined weekly KPI scoreboard review (§5)

triage.why: A no-show burns a scarce A-tier lead and the closest cash; calls don't reschedule cheaply

triage.task: V1 client-delivery on a live cycle (QC + ship today's clips)
triage.why: Paid, contractually-guaranteed work; the reputation the whole offer protects

triage.task: V2 live-ticket approval in the 2 SLA windows (if a partner is live)
triage.why: An anxious presale customer left hanging = a chargeback + "scam" review; SLA was promised
triage.floor: only the SLA windows, ≤90 min total

triage.task: The UGC drill (only while in P0 — the gate)
triage.why: Until it clears, nothing else produces V1 cash; it IS the bottleneck
triage.floor: protected in P0; n/a after graduation

triage.task: V1 outreach + reply-routing (DMs/sends, inbox to zero)
triage.why: Feeds calls #1; replies left cold go stale fast

triage.task: The single most time-critical V2 human block of the week (an interview, an onboard, or the paid ask — only if today is its scheduled day)
triage.why: Low-frequency but date-anchored; skipping slips the whole V2 stage
Fuels future outreach but not today's cash; templatized, easily batched tomorrow
Compounds slowly; an agent can draft it; a skipped day is survivable

triage.task: V2 next-cohort scouting, pain-mining, asset drafts
triage.why: Pure [AGENT] work — costs Chaga ~0 min; let it run unattended

timeline.v1: Buy domains; set up practice log; continue drill ladder; warmup long-pole prep begins
timeline.v2: Mode-A prep: approve roadmap; buy domain + start 21-day warmup; stand up Scout/Pain-Miner; ≤20 min total

timeline.v1: Drills D1–D6 done; D6 24-pack wall-clock logged; portfolio render starts; agent rig (Scout/Dispatcher/Pipeline) live
timeline.v2: Mode A: 100-row prospect sheet built; pain bank filling; playbook drafted; warmup maturing

timeline.v1: ⭐ GRADUATION (honest baseline) — S0 clears; switch to selling. Top-10 A-tier samples render; DM ignition
timeline.v2: Mode A continues — still agent-only; no human outreach yet

timeline.v1: First $497 packs landing; first pilots committing → baselines captured FIRST; first retainer quoted live
timeline.v2: Mode A: prospect list at 100; warmup complete (deliverable); staged and waiting for the GATE

timeline.v1: ★ V1 FIRST CASH BANKED ($3–5K) — THE RATIO-FLIP. This fires the V2 GATE.
timeline.v2: Mode B opens — V2 S0 begins: partner hunt + problem interviews (GATE-relative)

timeline.v1: 1–2 retainers landing; first case-study delta documented; S2 email engine at volume
timeline.v2: V2 S0→S1: ≥3 partners committed; onboard partner #1 live; concierge SLA windows begin; (Day-45 backstop checkpoint)

timeline.v1: ~$3–5K MRR; 2nd case study forming; pilots converting; capacity guard watch begins
timeline.v2: V2 S1→S2: 1–2 partners live; rolling baselines captured; chasing first leading-indicator win (FRT cut)

timeline.v1: 3rd case study landing; outreach flips proof-first; ASP quoted at standard
timeline.v2: V2 S2→S3: first documented leading-indicator win banked → S3b unlocked; App-Builder encodes proven scripts

timeline.v1: $6–9K MRR (realistic ~2 brands), 3 case studies, replenishing pipeline, PL 6→8
timeline.v2: 1–2 partners live + ≥1 documented win + (stretch) first paid conversion; S3 app reading live order data; listing may slip just past 90

timeline.v1: S5: lift ASP + hire first Post/Editor VA → path to $15–20K (~Day 150–180)
timeline.v2: GATE+90: 3–5 partners, first paid MRR, App Store listing; refund case study scheduled post-cohort

splitNote: Never 50/50, even at the end: V1 stays the larger share all 90 days because it is the cash engine carrying personal burn (~$3,000 CAD/mo) and its remaining human work — sales calls and client-delivery QC — cannot be offloaded and scales with each retainer signed. V2's human work is genuinely lower-frequency (a few weekly blocks + twice-daily SLA windows), so a 40–45% slice is enough to move it. The dial starts pinned at V1 (the skill gate can't be shared with anything) and turns toward V2 in two discrete clicks: first when the gate clears (freeing the deep AM block — but that capacity goes into V1 selling, not V2 yet), then when V1 first cash lands (which both proves V1's engine and fires the doc-36 GATE that unlocks V2's human motion). If the gate or first cash slips, every V2 phase slips with it — V2 is the shock absorber, never V1.

kpis.redFlag: <60% after ~40 → fix the most-failed rubric point, not volume

kpis.indicator: Priority sample-backed touches out / wk (DM pre-warmup, then email)
kpis.band: 150–250/wk post-warmup; 10 priority DMs in ignition week

kpis.redFlag: 5–9% → hand-rebuild 10 hooks on worst Track; <5% → rebuild 20, stop scaling
0 booked with replies coming → tighten the call-booking ask
a pilot shipped with no baseline = wasted proof
over ceiling → STOP selling, trigger VA hire
agent stalled → check Scout brief + gooseworks

kpis.indicator: Median FRT vs partner's own baseline
kpis.redFlag: no movement → the script, not the tool, is wrong

kpis.indicator: AI cost per resolved presale ticket

kpis.redFlag: >6 live-obligation for 3+ days → FREEZE new V1 selling + no new V2 live partner
